+-------[  Output Stage  ]--------+    +--------[  Transform Stage  ]--------+    +-------[  Input Stage  ]-------+
|                                 |    |                                     |    |                               |
| +---------+        +----------+ |    | +-----------+        +------------+ |    | +---------+        +--------+ |
| |  Write  |<-------+  Format  |<-------+  Convert  |<-------+  Validate  |<-------+  Parse  |<-------+  Read  | |
| +---------+        +----------+ |    | +-----------+        +------------+ |    | +---------+        +--------+ |
+---------------------------------+    +-------------------------------------+    +-------------------------------+
